languages.text: "Нарушение канонов и таинственные компоненты звучат как ересь".
"Such talk of deviation from canons and mysterious components sounds suspiciously akin to heresy."
languages.original_text: "Нарушение канонов и таинственные компоненты звучат как ересь".

traits.locale_text: "Such talk of deviation from canons and mysterious components sounds suspiciously akin to heresy."
"Such talk of deviation from canons and mysterious components sounds suspiciously akin to heresy."
"Such talk of deviation from canons and mysterious components sounds suspiciously akin to heresy."
"Such talk of deviation from canons and mysterious components sounds suspiciously akin to heresy."

languages.text: 「規範からの逸脱だの、謎めいた構成要素だのという話は、どうにも異端じみて聞こえるな」
languages.original_text: "Such talk of deviation from canons and mysterious components sounds suspiciously akin to heresy."

traits.locale_text: 「規範からの逸脱だの、謎めいた構成要素だのという話は、どうにも異端じみて聞こえるな」

languages.text: “这种关于偏离教规和神秘构件的言论，听起来很像异端邪说。”
languages.original_text: "Such talk of deviation from canons and mysterious components sounds suspiciously akin to heresy."

traits.locale_text: “这种关于偏离教规和神秘构件的言论，听起来很像异端邪说。”

languages.text: "Das ganze Gerede über die Abweichung von Kanons und mysteriöse Komponenten klingt für mich verdächtig nach Ketzerei."
languages.original_text: "Such talk of deviation from canons and mysterious components sounds suspiciously akin to heresy."

traits.locale_text: "Das ganze Gerede über die Abweichung von Kanons und mysteriöse Komponenten klingt für mich verdächtig nach Ketzerei."

languages.text: « Votre histoire de déviation des canons et de composants mystérieux a des relents d'hérésie. »
languages.original_text: "Such talk of deviation from canons and mysterious components sounds suspiciously akin to heresy."

traits.locale_text: « Votre histoire de déviation des canons et de composants mystérieux a des relents d'hérésie. »

languages.text: «Eso de la interpretación flexible de los cánones y los componentes misteriosos me suena a herejía».
languages.original_text: "Such talk of deviation from canons and mysterious components sounds suspiciously akin to heresy."

traits.locale_text: «Eso de la interpretación flexible de los cánones y los componentes misteriosos me suena a herejía».

languages.text: "Nizamnamelerden sapmaktan ve gizemli bileşenlerden bahsetmek, şüpheli bir şekilde kâfirliğe benziyor."
languages.original_text: "Such talk of deviation from canons and mysterious components sounds suspiciously akin to heresy."

traits.locale_text: "Nizamnamelerden sapmaktan ve gizemli bileşenlerden bahsetmek, şüpheli bir şekilde kâfirliğe benziyor."
